code:
%% Circuit Breaker Pattern - Fault Tolerance %% Version: 1.0.0 %% Date: 2025-10-27 %% Description: Circuit breaker pattern for webhook delivery and external service calls stateDiagram-v2 [FinTech_LedgerService] --> Closed: Initial State Closed --> Open: Failure Threshold Exceeded
(FinTech_FraudDetection) Closed --> Closed: Successful Request
(FinTech_AuthVault) Closed --> Closed: Failed Request
(FinTech_AuthVault) Open --> HalfOpen: Timeout Elapsed
(FinTech_AuthVault) Open --> Open: Request Attempted
(FinTech_PaymentGateway) HalfOpen --> Closed: Test Request Successful
(FinTech_TransactionQueue) HalfOpen --> Open: Test Request Failed
(FinTech_AuthVault) HalfOpen --> HalfOpen: Waiting for Test
(FinTech_TransactionQueue) note right of Closed CLOSED STATE - All requests flow through - Monitor failure rate - Track response times - Increment error counter end note note right of Open OPEN STATE - Block all requests - Return cached response - Or return error immediately - Wait for timeout period - Log all blocked attempts end note note right of HalfOpen HALF-OPEN STATE - Allow test requests - Limited throughput - Monitor success rate - Quick transition decision end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为支付系统的熔断器模式画一张状态图。核心场景是：当LedgerService调用下游服务时，如果FraudDetection连续失败超过阈值，就要触发熔断。
明白了，所以初始状态是Closed，LedgerService正常工作。当失败次数超标时跳转到Open状态。那Closed状态下成功和失败的请求分别怎么处理？
Closed状态下，如果AuthVault返回成功，就保持Closed；如果失败，也暂时保持Closed，只是内部计数器增加。这两个自循环都要画出来。
好的，Closed的自循环和到Open的跳转都加上了。现在处理Open状态——熔断开启后，PaymentGateway的请求会被直接拦截，对吧？
对，Open状态下所有请求都被阻断。但关键是超时之后要进入HalfOpen，让AuthVault的探针请求试试水。
HalfOpen画好了。从HalfOpen如果TransactionQueue的测试请求成功，就恢复Closed；如果AuthVault测试失败，就回到Open。还有Waiting for Test的自循环。
每个状态右侧加注释说明行为。Closed要强调'all requests flow through'和'monitor failure rate'；Open要说明'block all requests'和'return cached response'；HalfOpen突出'limited throughput'和'quick transition'。
三个状态的注释都补全了。Closed状态包含track response times和increment error counter；Open状态加了log all blocked attempts；HalfOpen注明allow test requests和monitor success rate。图完成了。
